violations.description: General employee practices. — --Observed employee soup stored on a shelf with clean linens.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under and behind the fryers is due for deep cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloths throughout the kitchen for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine.
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
